channel.title: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle." - ANNOUNCE NEW SCPS HERE! Please do not post sandbox links. Those go in the Drafts forum.

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
Re: SCP Announcements 47: SCP-5738
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5378 Hourling
I have recently created an entry on an anomalous being. i wonder if anyone who is a professional editor is willing to correct it.
Happyness is how you spell the entities name it is not an error. Hourling is what the entity calls the species it is.

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5978: Curse of Saint Mary

SCP-5978 is a god bound to earth by lust for misery and power. And now is in the Custody of the foundation. Classification Keter. Meet one of the most dangerous SCP code named Saint Mary. My first ever SCP. Hope you all will have a great time reading it and a happy new year to everyone :)

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5922 Textually Transmited Cognitohazard

This is my first SCP, it's a very short article about a Discord chat incident.

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5390 Out Of Time

This is my very first SCP about an old man and his timeless pocket watch.

Hope you all enjoy it! :)

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5623: Star Euthanizer

It is about a spaceship and it's weird interaction with stars. My first SCP that includes something of a bigger scale.

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5655 - Exactly the Kind of Genie You'd Expect To Find in an Empty Can of Off-Brand Spam

It's about a genie that's bad at granting wishes. It's funny[citation needed].

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5958 A micro cassette
This is the very first SCP I have ever written.

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5881: Nothing Like You

A character based skip about a guy trying to improve himself with the help of alternate versions of himself with better lives. My first article (yay!).

http://www.scpwiki.com/scp-5881

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5159: Mr. Emotions

Another Little Mister, Mr.Emotions is his name, this time with an outline that depending on how he feels, the colors will change! An SCP of, in, and about emotions!

Happy new year, and I take and read all feedback. Enjoy!

http://www.scpwiki.com/scp-5159

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
As a general note, feedback should ideally be sought before a mainlist post. Readers who vote on articles are not obligated to explain their vote; furthermore, if a piece is negatively rated, reviewers may not be keen to post critique if the page and its discussion thread will be deleted.

The How to Write an SCP Guide has instructions on where/how to seek feedback before posting material to the mainlist.

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5978: The Hourglass is now up!

Go check it out! I would appreciate feedback, to tell me what I can improve on, as this is my first SCP creation.

Happy New Year, and enjoy!
http://www.scpwiki.com/scp-5978

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5692: Illegal Aliens is now up!

Hope you enjoy!

http://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/scp-5692

item.title: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded: Please remember to read the text in the above post so your announcement will nest correctly.

item.title: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
To keep your balance you must keep moving.

TO ANNOUNCE AN SCP, PLEASE SCROLL DOWN AND CLICK "NEW POST".

Please do not post sandbox drafts here. Those should be brought to the Drafts Critique forum and/or the IRC chatrooms for feedback.
